_comment: REAL-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_admin.admin_system_postgres_health_check captured live 2026-05-13 from the dev environment (k3s prod, openagentic-admin remote-transport). Unlike standard FastMCP stdio servers that wrap dicts as content[{type:'text', text:<json>}], the openagentic-admin REMOTE transport surfaces the FastMCP tool's content list serialized as a python repr alongside a parallel result envelope at the SAME content-string level. The workflow engine's content-block joiner sees this as a single `content` field. The analyze transform must parse out the embedded `"result": {...}` block. This degraded-postgres response is the actual cluster state on 2026-05-13: the openagentic-admin pod cannot reach postgresql.agentic-dev.svc.cluster.local from its NetworkPolicy bucket.
